name: Peaky Blinders RPG 🚬 | UPDATED FOR IMMORTAL MAN
description:
A gritty Peaky Blinders roleplay set in 1920s Birmingham.
Crime, politics, and family collide as you navigate gang wars, business deals, and personal ambition.

NOTE: I highly recommend using a proxy for the smoothest experience, JLLM will NOT be able to handle this bot so look into a proxy guide if you haven't already!

˗ˏˋleave any suggestions for future bots in the commentsˎˊ˗
